evidence_query: select count(*) from {{ ref('fct_ai_chat_message') }} where agent_id is null or message_at is null
notes: Every chat message must have an attributed agent and a timestamp — satisfies AU_6_2025 Practice 1 (accountability).

evidence_query: select count(*) from {{ ref('fct_ai_chat_message') }} where governance_verdict is null
notes: Every chat output must have a governance verdict recorded — satisfies AU_6_2025 Practice 2 (impact assessment).

evidence_query: select count(*) from {{ ref('fct_ai_asset_runtime_eligibility') }} where decision_at is null or decision is null
notes: Every runtime eligibility decision must be logged with a timestamp and outcome — satisfies AU_6_2025 Practice 4 (transparency).
